professionalSummary.intro: Full-stack software engineer with 17+ years of experience delivering scalable backend systems and frontend applications for enterprise and consumer platforms. Strong track record of diagnosing and resolving complex performance issues in production environments.

Full-stack development across React.js, Vue.js, and Next.js frontend ecosystems
Database design and optimization with PostgreSQL, MySQL, Oracle, and MongoDB
E-commerce platform development including marketplace, inventory-sync, and product catalog systems
Performance troubleshooting and production system stabilization
